text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as we get back to the academy, Air Groove
and I bump into Silence Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hello, Suzuka. Are you heading out to train?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
No, I'm just going on a quick jog to clear my
head.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You always seem to be running. But I suppose
that's simply who you are.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Would you mind if I joined you? I'm also in the
mood for a light sprint.
choice_data_list: Our outing was that boring, huh?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Don't be ridiculous. On the contrary, I feel quite
refreshed. That's why I wish to run.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Would you mind, Suzuka?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um... As long as I get to run, I don't mind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite setting off together at a reasonable
pace...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Huff... Ngh!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... Grrr!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of them speed across the finish line at
the exact same time.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: As always, there's a bite to your running.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
You're the one who got really serious halfway
though.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Only because you got serious first.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yeah, because I didn't want to lose.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Heh... Very well. Shall we have a rematch?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Of course. I'll be going all out from the start this
time.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: As will I. No holds barred!
choice_data_list: I'm cheering for you, Air Groove!
I'm cheering for you, Air Groove!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: As will I. No holds barred!
choice_data_list: I'm cheering for you, Air Groove!
I'm cheering for you, Air Groove!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Of course. I wouldn't dream of it.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: And neither would I. Ready, Air Groove?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I'm ready when you are.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Ready... set...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although the two end up racing multiple times to
determine a winner, neither is able to secure a
clear victory.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Wh-why are you getting all worked up?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: This is just training. That's hardly necessary.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe, don't be so harsh. I'm a little jealous.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Ngh...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Enough! Are we running or not?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although the two end up racing multiple times,
neither is able to secure a clear victory.
